items.name_en: 🆕 M14628 Green! This small accessory cleverly blends classic and chic. It is made of iconic Monogram canvas, revealing a vibrant leather lining upon opening. This practical yet fun design is accented with an enamel charm and a metal charm, both featuring Louis' signature Monogram floral pattern. It can hold cash, coins, and three cards. 9x10x2.5cm

items.name_en: 🆕 【Top Quality】25917 Passport 👏👏 'Courchevel Passeport' is the perfect choice as a gift. Reinterpreted in dreamy beige to highlight the bag used to carry it. The functional design combines a sophisticated atmosphere with timeless charm, and the Monogram-Unplant leather of the Maison stands out. Dimensions: 10 x 14 x 2.5 cm

items.name_en: 🆕 【Top Quality】M25649 👏👏 The elegant 'Portouille Victorine' finished in timeless dreamy beige transcends seasons. Using Maison's single monogram unplant leather, it updates the Savoie project (craftsmanship) with bright gold accessories. Dimensions: 12 x 9.5 x 2.5 cm
items.name_cn: 🆕 【Top Quality】M25649 👏👏 The elegant 'Portouille Victorine' finished in timeless dreamy beige transcends seasons. Using Maison's single monogram unplant leather, it updates the Savoie project (craftsmanship) with bright gold accessories. Dimensions: 12 x 9.5 x 2.5 cm

items.name_en: 🆕 【Top Grade Original】M25594 Zipper 👏👏 This season's exclusive dreamy beige 'Gypsy Wallet' adds a fresh impression to the classic design as a Louis Vuitton iconic wallet. It features a single-piece non-inserted leather symbolizing the estate, paired with an elegant round zipper closure in classic bright gold. Dimensions: 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm

items.name_en: 🆕 【Top Grade Original】M14621 Passport 👏👏 From the 'Flight Mode' collection, the playful 'Couvert Passport' appears. Inspired by his travel collection, it is finished in a retro style. It features Monogram Dunne canvas, first seen on the Louis Vuitton Cruise 2023 collection. Dimensions: 10 x 14 x 2.5 cm

items.name_en: 🆕 【Top Grade Original】M14909 Cosmetic Pouch 👏🏻👏🏻 The 'Pochet Cosmetic PM' features a single-compartment Dunne canvas with Louis Vuitton retro travel stickers. The canvas, reminiscent of sand tones, gives a modern feel, while the 'stickers' evoke the origin of the estate. Dimensions: 19 x 12 x 6 cm

items.name_en: 🆕 【Top Grade Original】M12598 Black Monogram 👏👏 The 'Victoire Wallet' elegantly carries coins, cards, bills, and receipts in a single-piece Monogram canvas. Unbuttoning it reveals a bill pocket, five slots for credit cards and tickets, and a coin pocket with a zipper. Its size suitable for any pocket is also attractive. Dimensions: 11.5 x 9 x 2.5 cm

items.name_en: 🆕【Top Quality】M12635 Embossed 👏👏A compact "Victor Wallet" updated with a "Quai d'Orsay" vibe, featuring a single-embossed shadow leather. Besides a zippered pocket, it includes practical interiors with bill and receipt pockets and five card slots. The flap closed by a "Louis Vuitton"-signed shutter button is also charming. Dimensions: 11.5 x 9 x 2.5.

items.name_en: 🆕 【Top Quality】M62157 Black 👏👏This Capucines Compact wallet is made of flexible Taurillon leather, offering multiple functions and ample capacity to hold daily essentials. This elegant and compact wallet features a two-fold flap design that cleverly provides ample space for credit cards, coins, and bills. Dimensions: 13.5x9.0x2.0cm
